sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if ACTION7 changed any gray marks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
gray_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"Total single-pixel gray marks: {len(gray_nodes)}")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before_gray = [n for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['pixels'] == 1]
    print(f"Before gray count: {len(before_gray)}")
    print(f"After gray count: {len(gray_nodes)}")
    
    # Check row 0 change
    before_row0 = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')[0]
    after_row0 = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')[0]
    print(f"Row 0 before: '{before_row0}'")
    print(f"Row 0 after:  '{after_row0}'")
    
    # Find the difference
    for i in range(len(before_row0)):
        if before_row0[i] != after_row0[i]:
            print(f"  Col {i}: '{before_row0[i]}' -> '{after_row0[i]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
